# akka_project (Data Source)

Reads an existing Akka project by name. Use this data source to reference a project that was
created outside of Terraform or in a different Terraform workspace.

## Example Usage

```hcl
data "akka_project" "prod" {
  name = "production"
}

resource "akka_service" "api" {
  name    = "api-service"
  project = data.akka_project.prod.name
  image   = "docker.io/myorg/api:latest"
}
```

## Schema

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Project name to look up.

### Optional

- `organization` (String) Organization override.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Project description.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `region` (String) Primary deployment region.
